message.content: 让我继续看 NotionExtractionSupport 的剩余部分以及主流程入口：
message.reasoning_content: Now let me see the rest of NotionExtractionSupport.java and also check the main entry point / service that orchestrates everything. I also want to look at where the NotionCategoryInferenceService is wired in and where the category is set on Notion objects.
